sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: DeFi Technologies Inc. Notice of January 30, 2026 Application Deadline for Class Action Lawsuit- Contact Lewis Kahn, Esq. at Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC, Before Application Deadline
feed.summary: Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC (KSF) has notified investors of DeFi Technologies Inc. (NasdaqCM:DEFT) about a class action securities lawsuit. The lawsuit seeks to recover losses for investors affected by alleged securities fraud between May 12, 2025, and November 14, 2025. Investors have until January 30, 2026, to apply to be a lead plaintiff in the case.

feed.title: AMERIS BANCORP (NYSE:ABCB) Reports Mixed Q4 2025 Results with Earnings Beat and Revenue Miss
feed.summary: AMERIS BANCORP (NYSE:ABCB) reported mixed Q4 2025 results, with an earnings beat of $1.59 diluted EPS against an estimate of $1.605, but a revenue miss of $307.1 million compared to an estimated $316.5 million. Despite the mixed quarter, the company achieved record profitability for the full year 2025, with net income of $412.2 million. The market reaction was subdued, balancing the earnings strength against the revenue shortfall, with key highlights including margin expansion, disciplined expense management, and growth in assets and deposits.

feed.title: Gain Exposure to Nasdaq Stocks Without All the Risk
feed.summary: The article discusses how investors can gain exposure to Nasdaq stocks while mitigating risk, especially with sustained higher interest rates. It highlights the Calamos Alternative Nasdaq & Bond ETF (CANQ), which combines Nasdaq-100 exposure through LEAPS® and FLEX® options with fixed income investments for diversification and monthly income. The fund, launched in February 2024, aims to provide uncapped upside potential with the risk mitigation benefits of bonds, which historically perform well during interest rate cuts.

feed.title: There's No Escaping Dolphin Entertainment, Inc.'s (NASDAQ:DLPN) Muted Revenues Despite A 28% Share Price Rise
feed.summary: Dolphin Entertainment's (NASDAQ:DLPN) stock has risen 28% in the last month and 78% annually, yet its price-to-sales (P/S) ratio of 0.4x is significantly lower than the industry average. This low P/S ratio is attributed to the company's slow revenue growth, which has historically underperformed its peers. Analyst forecasts predict a 16% revenue climb for Dolphin Entertainment in the coming year, but this is still lower than the 18% growth expected for the broader entertainment industry, contributing to investor reluctance to justify a higher P/S ratio.

feed.title: Why Ciena (CIEN) Is Up 10.2% After New AI-Ready Optical Deals In Europe And Asia-Pacific
feed.summary: Ciena's stock rose 10.2% following new AI-ready optical deals with Telekom Srbija Group in Europe and Trans Pacific Networks in the Asia-Pacific. These deals highlight Ciena's crucial role in developing high-capacity, AI-centric optical backbones for global data flows and 5G demand. While positive, the stock's current valuation above fair value and thin net margins suggest that future growth hinges on quick conversion of AI demand into firm orders and successful execution without missteps.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley lowered Diamondback Energy, Inc. (FANG) target to $171 and maintained overweight rating
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has adjusted its price target for Diamondback Energy, Inc. (FANG) down to $171. Despite the reduction in the price target, the firm has chosen to maintain its 'overweight' rating on the stock. This indicates a continued positive outlook on Diamondback Energy's performance.

feed.title: Blackstone Secured Lending sets Feb. 25 webcast on 2025 results
feed.summary: Blackstone Secured Lending Fund (NYSE: BXSL) announced it will host an investor conference call via webcast on February 25, 2026, at 9:30 a.m. ET to discuss its fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 results. The company will release its earnings report earlier that morning. BXSL is a specialty finance company investing in the debt of private U.S. companies and is managed by Blackstone Private Credit Strategies LLC.

feed.title: KLA Corp. price target raised to $1,850 from $1,650 at BofA
feed.summary: BofA analyst Vivek Arya raised the price target for KLA Corp. (KLAC) to $1,850 from $1,650, maintaining a Buy rating on the shares. The analyst believes KLA could gain market share even with a shift towards memory in the wafer front end (WFE) market, leading to increased EPS estimates for 2026 and 2027. This positive adjustment comes despite concerns that KLA might be losing share.

feed.title: MTM Investment Management LLC Purchases 14,186 Shares of Deckers Outdoor Corporation $DECK

feed.title: Air Products Posts Higher Profit, Revenue on Pricing
feed.summary: Air Products and Chemicals reported increased profit and revenue in its fiscal first quarter, largely due to higher prices driven by elevated energy costs. The company's profit rose to $678.2 million, or $3.04 per share, compared to $617.4 million, or $2.77 per share, in the same period last year. Revenue climbed to $3.1 billion for the quarter ending December 31.

feed.title: SPY ETF Daily Update, 1/30/2026
feed.summary: The SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (SPY) is down 0.44% in pre-market trading, driven by a Technology sector sell-off and investor caution ahead of a Federal Reserve chair announcement. Despite this, TipRanks' ETF analyst consensus gives SPY a "Moderate Buy" rating with an implied upside potential of 17.71%. The ETF's Smart Score of eight suggests it is likely to outperform the broader market long-term.

feed.title: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals Inc Bottom Line Retreats In Q4
feed.summary: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals Inc (REGN) reported a decrease in its fourth-quarter profit compared to the previous year, with earnings totaling $844.6 million, or $7.86 per share. Despite the profit retreat, the company's revenue for the same period increased by 2.5% to $3.884 billion. Excluding certain items, adjusted earnings were $1.248 billion or $11.44 per share.

feed.title: The Truth About Xylem Inc: Why Wall Street Suddenly Can’t Ignore It
feed.summary: Xylem Inc (XYL) is gaining attention as a significant player in the climate-tech and water infrastructure sectors, despite its seemingly unexciting industrial nature. The company provides essential water technology solutions for cities and industries, addressing critical issues like water stress and aging infrastructure. While not a "viral" stock, its focus on smart water networks and sustainability makes it an increasingly relevant long-term investment.

feed.title: BRP Announces Auditor Transition from Deloitte to PwC Effective After 2026 Year-End Filing
feed.summary: BRP Inc. announced that it will transition its external auditor from Deloitte LLP to PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP following the filing of its fiscal year 2026 financial results. Deloitte will resign after completing the audit for the year ending January 31, 2026, with no reportable events or modified audit opinions noted. PwC will then assume the role, ensuring an orderly change with no disclosed accounting or audit disputes.

feed.title: Former Johnson & Johnson site ignites legal showdown over redevelopment in N.J. town
feed.summary: A Pennsylvania developer, E. Kahn Development (EKD), has filed a lawsuit against the Montgomery Township Planning Board for refusing to consider its application to redevelop a former Johnson & Johnson property, now known as the Kenvue site. This site, previously part of the township's affordable housing plan, is now facing local opposition and legal challenges from both the developer and the township regarding its future use and zoning. The lawsuit claims the board's refusal to hear the application was "arbitrary, capricious and unreasonable," while the township seeks immunity from exclusionary-zoning lawsuits by affirming its compliance with the Fair Housing Act.

feed.title: Jefferies maintains Hold rating on Fortinet stock amid high expectations
feed.summary: Jefferies has reiterated its Hold rating and $80.00 price target for Fortinet (NASDAQ:FTNT) before its Q4 earnings report on February 5th. Despite the stock appearing undervalued according to InvestingPro data, Jefferies maintains a cautious stance due to high investor expectations for 2026 and deteriorating software sector sentiment. The firm anticipates improved visibility on Fortinet's product refresh and services rebound in future quarters before adopting a more constructive position.
